english: On the golden mountain near the banks of the Kaveri river
Lord Ranganatha, served by Sanatkumara and other munis
roman: Sevyah sanat kumara adi muniganaih Shri Ranganathah

english: The recipient of Lakshmi's glances, with a divine body
I bow to Lord Ranganatha, Hari
Reclining on Ranga (the serpent bed) with Lakshmi beside him
Beloved of devotees, remover of the fear of worldly existence
To the lord of all, the primordial source — salutations
This Ranganathashtakam — whoever reads it daily with reverence
roman: Ranganatha ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam adarat

english: By the grace of Ranganatha he goes to the world of Vishnu
roman: Shri Ranganatha kripaya Vishnu lokam sa gachchhati
